title: [HW] Enhanced support for adding ports via HWMutableModuleLike
body:
The HWMutableModuleLike interface supports mutating HW module's ports: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/c8086bda4a0a8f77e9bfd58e706d5c6882681950/include/circt/Dialect/HW/HWOpInterfaces.td#L97-L99

However, this method does not mutate the module's OutputOp when new outputs are added.

The functionality to add ports and mutate the OutputOp exists on the HWModuleOp itself: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/c8086bda4a0a8f77e9bfd58e706d5c6882681950/include/circt/Dialect/HW/HWStructure.td#L100-L102

I would be great to expose `appendOutputs` in the interface, or enhance the implementation of existing interface methods to ensure the OutputOp is kept up to date. I want to be able to add outputs solely in terms of the interface.

A similar issue exists for modifying the module's block arguments when inputs are added: the interface methods do not appear to handle this either.
